title: Powder blue embroidered kurti & plazo set
description: Sleeveless kurti with dense white floral embroidery, matching wide-leg plazo (palazzo), and a sheer dupatta with lace trim — soft blue-grey, party or festive.

image.alt: Woman in powder blue embroidered sleeveless kurti with matching plazo trousers and dupatta

title: Farshi salwar suit — kurti & voluminous plazo
description: Traditional Farshi salwar silhouette: hip-length kurti with very wide, floor-pooling plazo trousers and dupatta. Reference shows olive-gold (long sleeves, V-neck) and magenta (sleeveless halter-style) — same dramatic cut, different necklines and colours. Festive or wedding-adjacent.

image.alt: Two women in matching-line Farshi salwar suits, olive green and magenta, with wide plazo and dupattas

title: Anarkali kurti & navy palazzo — blue floral block print
description: Two-piece ethnic set: flared Anarkali-style kurti in off-white / cream with blue floral block print, mandarin collar, navy button placket, elbow sleeves with navy cuffs; paired with solid deep navy wide-leg palazzo (plazo). Outdoor or festive-ready. Filter: Kurtis.

image.alt: Woman in cream and blue floral Anarkali kurti with navy mandarin collar and matching navy palazzo trousers

title: Navy sequin short kurti & draped lungi skirt
description: Two-piece party set in deep navy: short kurti with V-neck, long sleeves, and all-over geometric sequin embroidery, mirror-style teardrop fringe along the hem; paired with a matching satin-finish draped lungi skirt with front overlap and tulip hem. Filter: Kurtis.

image.alt: Woman in navy blue sequined short kurti with mirror fringe hem and matching draped lungi-style skirt

title: Western casual — powder blue linen co-ord
description: Inspiration: relaxed two-piece set (asymmetric tunic + wide-leg trousers), linen-look weave. Western wear, casual, summer. Filter: Custom designs — bring your fabric or reference.

image.alt: Model in powder blue linen-style co-ordinated top and wide-leg trousers

title: Western formal — chocolate blazer & cream trousers
description: Inspiration: tailored blazer, tank, and creased wide-leg trousers — office and smart events. Western wear, formal, business. Filter: Custom designs.

image.alt: Brown blazer with cream wide-leg trousers, flat-lay and mirror styling

title: Western casual — floral duster over black jumpsuit
description: Inspiration: sleeveless black jumpsuit with long floral kimono-style layer. Western wear, casual, smart casual, street style. Filter: Dresses.

image.alt: Woman in black jumpsuit with long floral print kimono on a city street

title: Western fusion — brocade crop top, jacket & wide plazo
description: Three-piece western / fusion co-ord: square-neck crop top, structured open-front cropped jacket with long sleeves, and high-waist wide-leg plazo (skirt-like drape). Rich dark brocade with gold and silver floral-paisley motifs — party or evening. Filter: Custom designs.

image.alt: Model in dark brocade fusion set: crop top, cropped jacket, and wide-leg plazo trousers with metallic gold pattern

title: Western one-piece — burgundy satin halter gown
description: Floor-length western evening gown in deep wine / burgundy satin: halter with draped cowl neckline, sleeveless, fitted bodice and waist with soft hip detail, one continuous piece with a sweeping floor-length silhouette (not a separate skirt and top). Formal events, receptions, or cocktail-to-black-tie depending on fabric finish. Filter: Dresses.

image.alt: Woman in floor-length burgundy satin halter evening gown with cowl neckline, outdoor garden setting

title: Western short dress — yellow floral, V-neck & puff sleeves
description: Mini-length western dress: cream / off-white base with yellow and tan floral print, deep V-neck, long gathered puff sleeves, fitted waistband, slight flare at hem, pearl-style buttons down the front. Brunch, day events, or casual parties. Filter: Dresses.

image.alt: Woman in short western floral dress with V-neck, long puff sleeves, and front buttons

title: Long dress — mustard A-line with collar & striped trim
description: Ankle-length A-line dress in mustard yellow textured cotton or linen look: collared neckline, button placket to the waist, three-quarter sleeves. Black-and-white striped detail on collar edges, placket lining, sleeve cuffs, and wide hem border. Garden or daytime events. Filter: Dresses.

image.alt: Woman in ankle-length mustard yellow collared dress with black and white striped collar, cuffs, and hem

title: Long dress — taupe geometric print & striped border maxi
description: Floor-length A-line maxi with small white geometric print on taupe / brown-grey: V-neck, decorative striped placket with buttons (white, black, grey, orange), three-quarter sleeves with matching striped cuffs, wide vertical-striped hem border. Fusion / maxi-kurti feel. Filter: Dresses.

image.alt: Woman in floor-length taupe geometric-print dress with multi-colour striped placket, cuffs, and hem

title: Western fusion — emerald plazo set with tunic & dupatta
description: Indo-western two-piece with dramatic wide plazo (sharara-style drape): sleeveless mid-thigh tunic with spaghetti straps, sweetheart neckline, gold floral embroidery on bodice and hem; matching forest-green sheer dupatta with gold border. Silk-satin look — sangeet, reception, or festive evening. Filter: Custom designs.

image.alt: Woman in emerald green fusion outfit: sleeveless embroidered tunic, very wide gold-print plazo, and sheer dupatta

title: Mom & me — casual western polka dot dresses
description: Coordinated mother–daughter summer dresses: cream / beige with black polka dots, lightweight flowy fabric. Women’s midi with ruffled neckline, cap sleeves, side tie belt, A-line skirt and ruffled hem; girl’s knee-length with Peter Pan collar and bow, matching cap sleeves and flounce. Beach, vacation, or weekend casual — we size both. Filter: Custom designs.

image.alt: Mother and daughter on a beach in matching cream polka-dot casual western dresses

title: Mom & me — casual tiered dresses, dusty rose & floral yoke
description: Matching mother–daughter western casual dresses in muted rose / mauve: round neck, three-quarter sleeves, delicate multicolour floral embroidery across the yoke, high-waist gathered skirt with a tiered seam toward the hem (midi-to-maxi on mom, scaled for her). Linen or cotton-slub feel — travel, outings, or everyday twinning. We size both. Filter: Custom designs.

image.alt: Mother and daughter holding hands in matching dusty rose tiered dresses with floral embroidered yokes, mountain path and waterfall behind

title: South Indian — Langa Voni (half saree), magenta & gold
description: Traditional three-piece Langa Voni: magenta choli with gold embroidery and beadwork, long pleated skirt in gold-olive with wide pink zari border, sheer matching dupatta (voni) with gold motifs and waist drape, ornate belt and side latkans. Festive, half-saree ceremony, or wedding guest. Filter: South Indian.

image.alt: Woman in South Indian Langa Voni with magenta blouse, gold pleated skirt, and draped dupatta with traditional jewellery

title: South Indian — Langa Voni, emerald & maroon zari
description: Classic half-saree set: floor-length pleated skirt in maroon with gold and green brocade motifs and deep green zari border; emerald green blouse with gold sleeve embroidery; dark green voni dupatta with scalloped gold edge, vaddanam belt. Ceremonial and wedding-season styling. Filter: South Indian.

image.alt: Woman in South Indian Langa Voni with maroon brocade skirt, emerald blouse, and green draped dupatta

title: Mom & daughter — matching Langa Odhani (half saree)
description: Coordinated South Indian Langa Odhani / Langa Voni for mother and child: bright yellow pleated langa with teal-green zari border, yellow choli with teal elbow sleeves and cuffs, teal voni dupatta with scalloped gold border. Matching festive jewellery styling — half-saree functions, festivals, or portraits. We tailor both sizes. Filter: South Indian.

image.alt: Mother and daughter in matching yellow and teal South Indian Langa Odhani with traditional jewellery

title: Mom & daughter — South Indian long frock (Anarkali)
description: Matching mother–daughter floor-length gowns in deep plum / purple silk-look fabric: fitted bodice with square neck, wide gold-and-red traditional border (elephant and temple motifs), slight puff at shoulder and matching cuff bands, full pleated skirt with ornate peacock-and-elephant hem border. Festive long-frock / Anarkali feel for weddings, functions, or portraits — we cut both sizes. Filter: South Indian.

image.alt: Mother and daughter in matching deep purple South Indian long frocks with gold and red woven borders

title: Teal & gold embroidered saree blouse — back with pearl dori
description: Rich teal / peacock silk-finish blouse with dense gold floral embroidery: deep U-shaped back with tie-up dori, pearl and bead latkans, long embroidered sleeves. Ethnic party or festive pairing with saree or lehenga. Filter: Blouses.

image.alt: Back view of teal gold-embroidered saree blouse with U-cut, pearl-trimmed dori and bow detail

title: Navy silk blouse — circular keyhole back, gold zari borders
description: Deep navy textured silk blouse with a bold circular keyhole cutout on the back, red piping, tie-up dori with tassels, and ornate gold zari borders on sleeves and hem — classic saree blouse for ceremonies. Filter: Blouses.

image.alt: Back view of navy saree blouse with circular cutout, gold brocade borders, and decorative dori

title: Maroon printed blouse — scalloped U-back & puff sleeves
description: Maroon base with subtle gold geometric print: dramatic U-shaped back with scalloped edge and bead drops, short puff sleeves with gathered cuffs — festive saree blouse reference. Filter: Blouses.

image.alt: Back view of maroon gold-print saree blouse with U-cut back, bead trim, and puff sleeves

title: Gold mirror-work blouses — keyhole & high-neck back designs
description: Reference collage: ornate gold-toned saree blouses with mirror work and dense floral embroidery — teardrop keyhole back (top) and larger rounded opening with tassel ties (bottom). High-neck collar and sheer embroidered sleeves. Filter: Blouses.

image.alt: Collage of two gold embroidered saree blouse back designs with mirror work and cutouts

title: Teal damask blouse — scalloped open back & puff sleeves
description: Teal / forest green with gold floral damask: scalloped open-back silhouette, tie-ups with fabric latkans, puff sleeves with ruffled cuffs — designer saree blouse inspiration. Filter: Blouses.

image.alt: Back view of teal gold damask saree blouse with scalloped cutout and puff sleeves

title: Emerald silk blouse — ornate window back & maggam embroidery
description: Deep emerald silk with heavy gold zari embroidery, gemstone accents, high-neck band and dramatic window-style back cutout, central dori and statement latkan — bridal / festive maggam-style work. Filter: Blouses.

image.alt: Back view of emerald green heavily embroidered saree blouse with window cutout and gold details

title: Cream embroidered blouse — circular keyhole & multicolour tassels
description: Off-white / cream blouse with pink, teal, and gold floral-paisley embroidery, circular keyhole back with cord ties and long multicolour tassels, gold waist belt visible — occasion saree styling. Filter: Blouses.

image.alt: Back view of cream floral-embroidered saree blouse with circular cutout and colourful tassel latkans

title: Light pink blouse — sheer floral back with pearl buttons
description: Soft light pink / mauve saree blouse: sheer mesh upper back with white floral embroidery, vertical row of fabric-covered buttons, elbow sleeves fully embroidered — elegant reception or wedding guest look. Filter: Blouses.

image.alt: Back view of light pink embroidered saree blouse with sheer panel and pearl-style buttons

title: Cream lace skirt-top set
description: Formal two-piece: cropped button-down shirt with delicate white lace pattern, floral brooch, and a matching high-waist pleated skirt with a crystal-embellished bow — pale yellow / cream, party or portrait-ready. Filter: Skirt & top.

image.alt: Young girl in a pale cream lace skirt-top set with pleated skirt and bow, formal garden setting

title: Pink sparkly tulle party frock
description: Sleeveless knee-length party dress: structured bodice in pink and white iridescent mermaid-scale pattern with thin straps and large iridescent bows at the front, full flared tulle skirt in soft pink with fine glitter and sequin sparkle — birthdays, portraits, or celebrations. Filter: Dresses.

image.alt: Young girl in a pastel pink sparkly tulle party dress with mermaid-scale bodice and white bows

title: Fuchsia bodice floral party frock
description: One-piece girls' party dress / frock: sleeveless hot-pink bodice with layered shoulder ruffles, white A-line skirt with large pink rose print and green-grey leaves, oversized bow at the waist in matching floral fabric — portraits, birthdays, or celebrations. Filter: Dresses.

image.alt: Young girl in a one-piece party frock with fuchsia ruffle bodice, white floral skirt, and large waist bow on a white staircase
